source: user-captured 40s @ 918 MHz, 2.4 Msps, RTL-SDR – ShortFast (SF7/250kHz) preset
notes: Covers the SF7/BW=250kHz path (smallest LoRa configuration: N=128, 4ms preamble). Important regression coverage because SF7 has only 21dB processing gain vs SF12's 36dB, so probe SNR thresholds and detector timing margins are tightest here.
